span_mappings.nl_span: An element belongs to a reversed cycle exactly when it belongs to the original cycle

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib11_cycle_mem_reverse {α : Type u} {a : α} {s : Cycle α} : a ∈ s.reverse ↔ a ∈ s
natural_language_claim: An element belongs to a reversed cycle exactly when it belongs to the original cycle.
